comment.body:
your question is valid. Regular mathematical definition is this 

"In statistics, a centroid represents the "center" of a set of data points, calculated as the mean of the coordinates for each dimension"

However the nuanced definition in Alma's context might be if price above centroid, probability increases to go to upside pivot however will not be a straight line. 

Better play is for playing the higher probabilities or stronger probabilities either at the vanna flip ( strong support) or strong resistance at the upside.
